chapter_title.ar: باب شَهَادَةِ الْوَالِدِ لِلْوَلَدِ وَ شَهَادَةِ الْوَلَدِ لِلْوَالِدِ وَ شَهَادَةِ الْأَخِ لِأَخِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – Testimony of the father for the son, and the testimony of the son for the father, and testimony of the brother for his brother

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/244)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/244)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) تَجُوزُ شَهَادَةُ الْوَلَدِ لِوَالِدِهِ وَ الْوَالِدِ لِوَلَدِهِ وَ الْأَخِ لِأَخِيهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad  Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Abu Al Magra, from Al Halby who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is allowed, the testimony of the son for his father, and of the father for his son, and of the brother for his brother’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from abu al-Mighra’ from al-Halabiy who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The testimony of a father for his son, the testimony of a son for his father and the testimony of a brother for his brother is permissible.’”
